title: Ürümqi, Xinjiang — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Ürümqi, Xinjiang: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Ürümqi is a city in Xinjiang with a population of 4,054,000. The largest city in Central Asia’s heartland, a multicultural Silk Road hub where Uyghur and Han cultures converge.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
